titleStmt.title: SII 30.130: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 130. (A.R. No. 208 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīsvarā temple-On the west wall Pārthivēndravarmaṉ: year 6: 965 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription records the gift of 440 kuḻi of land for feeding two brāhmaṇās who were well versed in vēdas during the midday, by the assembly of añjaṣṭasam of Tiruvēgambapuram in Rājamallach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Dāmark-kōṭṭam. The sabhā members took this decision at a meeting held during the day time in the big maṇḍapa of this village and placed this charity under the members of the committee called gaṇavāriyam. It is also stated that one among the Brahmins to be fed before the food offering made to Paramēśvara, the deity of the temple. Āyirattirunūṟṟuva Tikai[ttiṟa]lōttamaṉ figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopārtdhivendravarmmarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu tāmarak koṭṭattut tiruvekampapuṟattu rājama
llaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu Añcaṣṭaśattu mahāsabhaip perumakkaḷom Em
mūr perumaṇṭapatte pakal peruṅkuṟi kūṭi Iruntu Ivvūr kuvala kiḻār maṇiśiva bhaṭṭa sarvakṛdu
yājiyār makan mahādevakramavittan tikaittiṟalerikiḻ kunṟappāk kiḻāṉ śivabhrata kramavi
ttaṉ taravukku kūṟappaṭṭa pāṭakattu mekkaṭaiyat tan Ayican nāṉūṟṟu nālppatu kuḻiiraṇṭān=ta
ram Ivvūr śrīpontaip perumānaṭikaḷ śrīkoyil Iraṇṭu brāhmaṇar viruntūṇ Uṇpa
tāka vacca nāṉūṟṟu nāl(p)patu kuḻiyālum van=ta Iṟai(y)mā voru mā nilamum Ācantrakālamu
māka Iṟai Oḻiyap paṇiyttu Iṟaiiḻicci Ibrāhmaṇar Iruvarkkum Uttamāgram Oruvane madhyāhnattil pa
rameśvarar Amutu ceyvatarkku muṉpu kaṟiyum neyyum tayirum Iraṇṭu pākkum nālu veṟṟilaiyum Ippari
cu Uttamāgramuṭṭāme nicatam Oru brāhmaṇaṉ vedam vallāṉ Ācantrakālamum Apūrvikaḷe Ūṭṭuvatā
ka Inānūṟṟu nālpatu kuḻiyum Iṟai Iḻicci kuṭuttom Añcaṣṭaśattu mahāsabhaip perumakkaḷom Ippaṭi
gaṇavāriyañ ceyvāre Ūṭṭap paṇittom Isabhaip paṇikka Eḻutinen Āyirattirunūṟṟuva tikaitiṟa lottamanen ..
Digital edition of SII 30.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
